scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const bun = spawnSync('bun', ['--version'], { encoding: 'utf8', shell: true }); if (!bun.error && bun.status === 0) { console.log(bun.stdout.trim()); process.exit(0); } const node = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--version'], { encoding: 'utf8' }); if (!node.error && node.status === 0) { console.log(node.stdout.trim()); process.exit(0); } console.log('Warning: Neither Bun nor Node.js found. Please install Bun from https://bun.sh');"
scripts.typecheck: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const tsc = spawnSync('tsc', ['--noEmit'], { encoding: 'utf8', shell: true }); if (!tsc.error && tsc.status === 0) { process.exit(0); } console.log('TypeScript check skipped (tsc not available)');"
